title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: A personal portfolio website built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to showcase my projects and skills.

title: On-Device Whisper AI Assistant
description: Developed an on-device AI feature integrating OpenAI's Whisper model for offline speech-to-text transcription on Android Interactive Displays. Optimized inference pipeline for low-latency performance, contributing to Samsung's AI Assistant project. Built using Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, C++, and Whisper.

title: Classification Simulation (Brain Signal Analysis)
description: Engineered a TRL-4 prototype to classify EEG brain signals using MLPClassifier, enabling patients with motor neuron disease to communicate with their environment. Utilized EMOTIV INSIGHT hardware for real-time data collection, classifying test data with 90% accuracy. Built using Python and Tkinter.

title: Fashion Recommender
description: Created an application to recommend fashion products using a pre-trained ResNet model trained on over 1 million images. Implemented a K-Nearest Neighbors algorithm for image similarity, achieving 98% prediction accuracy. Built using Python, Streamlit, and TensorFlow.
